privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for sweet_home_3d_env police_precinct_conversion task by confirming the programmatic generation of the 'precinct_starter.sh3d' building shell from 'SweetHome3DExample.sh3d'. Discovered a critical defect: the task's export_result.sh and setup_task.sh scripts incorrectly attempt to read doors by looking for a 'doorOrWindow' attribute on '<pieceOfFurniture>' tags, but Sweet Home 3D actually saves doors using a separate '<doorOrWindow>' tag. Consequently, the verifier will always see 0 'new_doors' regardless of agent actions, making Criterion 3 (C3) perpetually fail and impossible to score. Additionally, C5 requires 35 total furniture items for full points, although the prompt explicitly mandates only 26 specific items.
